channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][公开] Anime News Network BAKI-DOU: Invincible Samurai Anime的 Part 2 预告PV 公开 新作 Theme Songs
item.description: Chevon performs "Musashi/Roku no Rin" opening, J SOUL BROTHERS III perform "Katana" ending ― Netflix began streaming a new trailer for the second part of BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai, the anime... | 来源: ANN | 原文: BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai Anime's Part 2 Trailer Reveals New Theme Songs
